queries.question: Provide a list of names of restaurants and also provide a list of names of cafes that serve lasagna.
queries.sql:
SELECT Restaurants.name
FROM Menu_Options JOIN Restaurant_Menus ON Menu_Options.id = Restaurant_Menus.menu_option_id JOIN Restaurants ON Restaurant_Menus.restaurant_id = Restaurants.id
UNION
SELECT Cafe.name
FROM Menu_Options JOIN Cafe_Menus ON Menu_Options.id = Cafe_Menus.menu_option_id JOIN Cafe ON Cafe_Menus.cafe_id = Cafe.id
WHERE Menu_Options.option_name = "Lasagna"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?menu_options a :Menu_Options .
    ?restaurant_menus a :Restaurant_Menus .
    ?restaurant_menus p:hasMenu_Options ?menu_options .
    ?restaurants a :Restaurants .
    ?restaurant_menus p:hasRestaurants ?restaurants .
    ?restaurants p:name ?name .
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?menu_options a :Menu_Options .
    ?cafe_menus a :Cafe_Menus .
    ?cafe_menus p:hasMenu_Options ?menu_options .
    ?cafe a :Cafe .
    ?cafe_menus p:hasCafe ?cafe .
    ?cafe p:name ?name .
    ?menu_options p:option_name ?option_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?option_name_f) = "Lasagna")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: What are names of restaurants that serve lasagna and names of cafes that also serve it?
queries.sql:
SELECT Restaurants.name
FROM Menu_Options JOIN Restaurant_Menus ON Menu_Options.id = Restaurant_Menus.menu_option_id JOIN Restaurants ON Restaurant_Menus.restaurant_id = Restaurants.id
WHERE Menu_Options.option_name = "Lasagna"
UNION
SELECT Cafe.name
FROM Menu_Options JOIN Cafe_Menus ON Menu_Options.id = Cafe_Menus.menu_option_id JOIN Cafe ON Cafe_Menus.cafe_id = Cafe.id
WHERE Menu_Options.option_name = "Lasagna"
queries.sparql:

    FILTER(STR(?option_name_f) = "Lasagna")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)

  UNION
  {
    ?menu_options a :Menu_Options .
    ?cafe_menus a :Cafe_Menus .

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show names of all restaurants and cafes that serve lasagna.
